name: Risotto with Sundried Tomatoes~ Pressure Cook
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 to 4 cups Vegetable stock or bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter and oil in the pressure cooker.
2. Sauté the onion until soft but not brown for about 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the rice, ensuring it is thoroughly coated with the fat.
4. Add 3 1/2 cups of vegetable stock or bouillon.
5. Lock the lid in place and switch to high heat.
6. Bring to high pressure and maintain it for 6 minutes.
7. Reduce the pressure using the quick release method.
8. Carefully remove the lid and taste the rice.
9. If needed, add a bit more stock as you stir until the desired consistency is reached.
10. Cook over medium heat until any remaining liquid has been absorbed, another minute or two.
11. Stir in the tomatoes and mozzarella, adding salt if desired.
12. Serve immediately.
